personalInfo.about: Third-year BSIT student at Central Luzon State University who enjoys building things across the stack — from desktop games and GUI applications to database-backed systems, web tools, and machine learning models.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology

projects.title: Snake Game
projects.description: A classic Snake game built with a Java GUI, featuring real-time keyboard controls, collision detection, and score tracking.

projects.title: Student Monitoring System
projects.description: A system for recording and tracking student records, grades, and attendance, backed by a relational database.

projects.title: Page Replacement Algorithm Simulator
projects.description: An interactive web app that visualizes how page replacement algorithms (e.g., FIFO, LRU) manage memory frames step by step.

projects.title: Loan Prediction Model
projects.description: A machine learning model trained on applicant data to predict loan approval outcomes, built and tested in Google Colab.

projects.title: Calculator App
projects.description: A simple calculator application built with Java Swing, featuring basic arithmetic operations and a clean user interface.
